description: This file defines negative question formation in the Future Perfect tense in Njo Viri (Balanda). Future perfect negative questions ask whether an action will not have been completed by a future time.

general_principle.statement: Future perfect negative questions in Balanda are formed by retaining the future prefix 'le-', the completion marker 'dheki', adding the negation marker 'gba', and placing the question marker 'we?' sentence-finally.

negative_question_structure.structure: Subject + le-Verb(base) + (Object / Complement) + dheki + gba + we?
constraints: The future prefix 'le-' must remain attached to the verb base
The verb must remain in base form
The completion marker 'dheki' must be retained
The negation marker 'gba' must appear before 'we?'
The question marker 'we?' must be sentence-final

tense_and_aspect_distinction.rule: Future perfect negative questions encode future tense and negated completion.

error_constraints: Do not use the progressive prefix 'ti-'
Do not move 'we?' from sentence-final position

balanda: Ne leja se dheki gba we?
english: Will I not have eaten fish?

balanda: Ni lenzü ngo dheki gba we?
english: Will she not have drunk water?

balanda: Danda leteli muru famvara dheki gba we?
english: Will we not have slept on the bed?

balanda: Uku leyai dheki gba we?
english: Will Uku not have gone?

balanda: Ngande ledhii ba dheki gba we?
english: Will Ngande not have come home?

balanda: Ndi lenonö gbi difo dheki gba we?
english: Will they not have walked in the compound?

balanda: Ni lenangele zanga dheki gba we?
english: Will she not have run fast?

balanda: Uku lemande gbi njü dheki gba we?
english: Will Uku not have worked in the garden?

balanda: Wiki lemoliki gbi difo dheki gba we?
english: Will the child not have played in the compound?

balanda: Ne leloro voro dheki gba we?
english: Will I not have watched the dog?

balanda: Ne levele njo balanda dheki gba we?
english: Will I not have spoken Balanda?

balanda: Wilii lesudi kavoso dheki gba we?
english: Will the girl not have written words?

balanda: Ne ledheke kitabu dheki gba we?
english: Will I not have read a book?

balanda: Ni leteri ay dheki gba we?
english: Will he not have thought about it?

balanda: Ndi leŋiyi ay dheki gba we?
english: Will they not have known it?

balanda: Ne lewe ndi dheki gba we?
english: Will I not have asked them?

balanda: Ngande levele zi ndi dheki gba we?
english: Will Ngande not have told them?

balanda: Wilii lekeye ti naa ni dheki gba we?
english: Will the girl not have called her mother?

balanda: Ne lemerego ŋo dheki gba we?
english: Will I not have loved you?

balanda: Ni lemaguku ti kpörö dheki gba we?
english: Will he not have feared the snake?

balanda: Ni lesogo ni dheki gba we?
english: Will she not have hated him?

balanda: Ngande leriki ni dheki gba we?
english: Will Ngande not have surprised him?

balanda: Ni ledovee kurru dheki gba we?
english: Will he not have seemed calm?

balanda: Wilii leyele tamma dheki gba we?
english: Will the girl not have tied the shoe?

balanda: Ni ledi kalla dheki gba we?
english: Will he not have cut the pot?

balanda: Ne letele njokoji dheki gba we?
english: Will I not have pulled the door?

balanda: Danda leturu songo dheki gba we?
english: Will we not have pushed the box?

balanda: Wilii lesoko tamma dheki gba we?
english: Will the girl not have washed the shoe?

balanda: Ne lekuru kavokau dheki gba we?
english: Will I not have hidden the beads?

balanda: Ngande lengö tiyi dheki gba we?
english: Will Ngande not have built a house?

balanda: Ne lesuru kavoso dheki gba we?
english: Will I not have created words?

balanda: Ni legiri kavoso dheki gba we?
english: Will she not have changed the words?

balanda: Ne lekara njokoji dheki gba we?
english: Will I not have turned the door?

balanda: Danda letoko villi dheki gba we?
english: Will we not have added money?

balanda: Ne lekefo Balanda dheki gba we?
english: Will I not have described Balanda?

balanda: Ndi lekonu nvesani dheki gba we?
english: Will they not have helped the poor?

balanda: Ngande lendugu mira dheki gba we?
english: Will Ngande not have initiated the project?

balanda: Ne lemaforo mira dheki gba we?
english: Will I not have contributed to the project?

balanda: Wilii lesarwa kumere dheki gba we?
english: Will the girl not have separated trash?

balanda: Danda lekiri tidina dheki gba we?
english: Will we not have upheld the law?

balanda: Ne leduru ngo dheki gba we?
english: Will I not have wanted water?

balanda: Ni leze villi dheki gba we?
english: Will she not have given money?

balanda: Ne ledhe villi dheki gba we?
english: Will I not have found money?

balanda: Uku lemele vongu dheki gba we?
english: Will Uku not have tried the cloth?

balanda: Ngande lesi ba dheki gba we?
english: Will Ngande not have left home?

balanda: Ne lelu Wau dheki gba we?
english: Will I not have arrived in Wau?

balanda: Ni lefagi mva dheki gba we?
english: Will he not have sharpened the knife?

balanda: Ngande ledewe kakpodu dheki gba we?
english: Will Ngande not have imitated adults?

balanda: Danda lebita mira dheki gba we?
english: Will we not have started the project?

balanda: Ni leteta dheki gba we?
english: Will he not have fallen?
